title: Baltimore Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Baltimore with a Z-Score of +3.46. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Baltimore are characterized by high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 11.1 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 48%, which can exacerbate the perception of heat. 
 The wind speed is moderate, at 11.6 km/h, but it is not enough to provide significant relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
